artifacts.purpose: Canonical agent guidance, a verbatim byte-identical copy of templates/AGENTS.template.md; replaced whole on governance refresh, never hand-edited. Repo-specific content lives in .agents/repo-guidance.md, which it imports.

All repo-specific guidance carved out of AGENTS.md on 2026-07-02: mission detail, reading order, verification commands, remotes and canon-propagation, earned practices. Extends AGENTS.md, never overrides it.
Repo push policy consulted after every commit (see AGENTS.md Prime Invariants)
One-line Claude Code shim (@AGENTS.md) plus this repo's @.agents/RTK.md import, so the harness (and the re-ground hook) reach the canonical guidance and Prime Invariants
Current repo state, active work, blockers, next actions, verification commands, and unrecorded repo memory
Live durable decisions (Active) and the Open Decisions queue; closed entries are archived to docs/history/decisions-archive.md
Verification commands and policy, fact-bearing paths, guidance paths, project notes
Inventory of the durable guidance artifacts with custody evidence from git at time of bootstrap
Provenance log of closed (Adopted/Superseded) decisions, moved verbatim out of the live decisions doc
Claude Code slash-command wrapper pointing at the catchup operator in AGENTS.md
Claude Code slash-command wrapper pointing at the handoff operator in AGENTS.md
Claude Code slash-command wrapper pointing at the drift operator in AGENTS.md
Claude Code slash-command wrapper pointing at the decision operator in AGENTS.md
Claude Code slash-command wrapper pointing at the plan operator in AGENTS.md
Claude Code slash-command wrapper pointing at the playbook operator in AGENTS.md
Claude Code re-ground hook: on SessionStart compact, prompts a re-read of AGENTS.md (especially the Prime Invariants)
Machine-local Claude Code settings; intentionally not committed
